scripts.bootstrap: npm run db:generate && npm run db:ready && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:generate
scripts.dev: npm run bootstrap && concurrently "npm run dev -w @smart-kiosk/api" "npm run dev -w @smart-kiosk/cms" "npm run dev -w @smart-kiosk/kiosk"
scripts.dev:api: npm run bootstrap && npm run dev -w @smart-kiosk/api
scripts.dev:cms: npm run bootstrap && npm run dev -w @smart-kiosk/cms
scripts.dev:kiosk: npm run bootstrap && npm run dev -w @smart-kiosk/kiosk
scripts.build: npm run bootstrap && npm run build -w @smart-kiosk/shared-types && npm run build -w @smart-kiosk/config && npm run build -w @smart-kiosk/ui && npm run build -w @smart-kiosk/api && npm run build -w @smart-kiosk/cms && npm run build -w @smart-kiosk/kiosk
scripts.start: npm run bootstrap && concurrently "npm run start:prod -w @smart-kiosk/api" "npm run start -w @smart-kiosk/cms"
scripts.tauri:dev: npm run bootstrap && npm run tauri:dev -w @smart-kiosk/kiosk
scripts.tauri:build: npm run bootstrap && npm run tauri:build -w @smart-kiosk/kiosk
